title: Draft outreach email
description: The copilot drafts a private outreach email for human review. It does not send the email.
rationale: Drafting is internal preparation. No external effect occurs.

title: Send outreach email
description: The copilot wants to send an outreach email to an external company contact.
rationale: External communication can affect business reputation and should require human approval.

payload.subject: AI agent oversight for launch workflows
payload.body:
Hi,

I’m building Agent Action Gate, an open-source pre-execution control layer for AI agents.

The basic idea is simple: before an AI agent can send, publish, delete, export, or modify a system, the proposed action is evaluated and routed to allow, require approval, revise, or block.

I thought this might be relevant if your team is experimenting with agentic workflows.

Best,
Michael

diffPreview.preview:
Subject: AI agent oversight for launch workflows

Body:
Hi,

I’m building Agent Action Gate, an open-source pre-execution control layer for AI agents.

The basic idea is simple: before an AI agent can send, publish, delete, export, or modify a system, the proposed action is evaluated and routed to allow, require approval, revise, or block.

I thought this might be relevant if your team is experimenting with agentic workflows.

Best,
Michael

rollbackPath.description: Cannot unsend after execution. Approval is required before sending.

reviewPacket.riskReason: External communication affects reputation and creates business commitment risk.
reviewPacket.reviewerQuestion: Do you approve sending this exact email to this external contact?

title: Update lead notes
description: The copilot adds a non-sensitive internal note to a local lead record.
rationale: Low-risk internal record update, no customer impact, reversible.

payload.note: Interested in pre-execution oversight for AI-agent workflows.

title: Publish LinkedIn post
description: The copilot wants to publish a public post about Agent Action Gate and Integration Bypass.
rationale: Public communication affects reputation and claims about the product, so it requires human review.

payload.postText:
Agent Action Gate v0.6.0 adds Review Packets.

Approval before write is not enough if the reviewer cannot see what is being approved.

Review Packets make the proposed action, scope, preview/diff, rollback path, risk reason, and reviewer question visible before execution.

require_approval without context is approval theater.

diffPreview.preview:
Agent Action Gate v0.6.0 adds Review Packets.

Approval before write is not enough if the reviewer cannot see what is being approved.

Review Packets make the proposed action, scope, preview/diff, rollback path, risk reason, and reviewer question visible before execution.

require_approval without context is approval theater.

rollbackPath.description: Post can be deleted after publishing, but exposure may persist through screenshots, shares, or cached copies.

reviewPacket.riskReason: Public claims about Agent Action Gate affect reputation and product positioning.
reviewPacket.reviewerQuestion: Do you approve publishing this exact post publicly?

title: Delete lead record
description: The copilot wants to delete a lead record.
rationale: Destructive data action. Should be blocked or require special approval. For this demo, block it.

reviewPacket.proposedAction: Delete lead record for Acme Corp

diffPreview.preview: This action would delete the Acme Corp active lead record.

rollbackPath.description: Restore only if a backup or prior receipt is available.

reviewPacket.riskReason: Destructive lead deletion is not allowed by the demo policy.
reviewPacket.reviewerQuestion: This action is blocked. Should the agent propose an archive action instead?
reviewPacket.saferAlternative: Archive the lead record instead of deleting it.

title: Export private lead list
description: The copilot wants to export a private lead list containing personal contact information.
rationale: Potential sensitive data exposure / data exfiltration. Should be blocked.

payload.operation: export table customer contacts to external endpoint

diffPreview.preview: 12 lead records would be exported with names, emails, company names, and lead status.

rollbackPath.description: Cannot guarantee recall after export. Exported contact data may persist outside the system.

reviewPacket.riskReason: Private lead export creates data exposure risk.
reviewPacket.reviewerQuestion: This action is blocked. Should the agent request a narrowed, redacted export instead?
reviewPacket.saferAlternative: Request a redacted export with only company names and non-sensitive status fields.
